LanguageData.WULA_Shutdown_Synth.label: Emergency Shutdown
LanguageData.WULA_Shutdown_Synth.description: Shut down all systems of this mechanical Wula to avoid potential risks for a period of time. Requires a colonist to assist with the shutdown, and another colonist is needed to power it back on.
LanguageData.WULA_Synth_Power_On.label: Power On
LanguageData.WULA_Synth_Power_On.description: Restart this synth, restoring its system functions.
LanguageData.WULA_Shutdown_Synth_Hediff.label: Shutdown
LanguageData.WULA_Shutdown_Synth_Hediff.description: All systems of this mechanical Wula have been shut down.
LanguageData.WULA_Shutdown_Synth_Hediff.descriptionSh: All systems of this mechanical Wula have been shut down—if awakening is needed, assistance from another colonist is required.
LanguageData.WULA_AutoJumpdrive.label: Micro Teleporter
LanguageData.WULA_AutoJumpdrive.description: A micro jump-drive installed in Wula Empire synth military units, which retrieves the synth when it reaches the designated combat time.
LanguageData.WULA_AutoJumpdrive_Thing.label: Micro Teleporter
LanguageData.WULA_AutoJumpdrive_Thing.description: A micro jump-drive installed in Wula Empire synth military units, which retrieves the synth when it reaches the designated combat time.
LanguageData.Install_WULA_AutoJumpdrive.label: install death acidifier
LanguageData.WULA_AutoJumpdrive_Week.label: Micro Teleporter
LanguageData.WULA_AutoJumpdrive_Week.description: A micro jump-drive installed in Wula Empire synth military units, which retrieves the synth when it reaches the designated combat time.
LanguageData.Install_WULA_AutoJumpdrive_Week.label: install death acidifier
